title: Supercruise Exit Targets
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM SupercruiseExit WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Body AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM SupercruiseExit WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} supercruise exit(s) recorded during the report period. Drop destinations tell your daily routine at fine granularity — frequent drops at Compromise Beacons or Hazardous Resource Extraction Sites signal bounty hunting or mining; Tourist Beacons hint at exploration side trips; stations suggest trading or mission running.
details.help: SupercruiseExit Body is the destination body or station name. total drives the title.

tagLines: Supercruise exit destination log compiled. Drop location frequency distribution noted in the flight record.
Where you drop out of supercruise is where the work is. The chart shows what work that was.
Every drop has a purpose. The most frequent ones reveal what you actually spend your time doing.
